titleStmt.title: The Acting Secretary of State to the Ambassador in France ( Caffery )

div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Ambassador in France ( Caffery )
div.p: 5860. For Angell No. 99. Categories of beneficiaries in para 1 urtel 139, Dec 12See telegram 7122, December 12, 8 a.m., from Paris, p. 1454. satisfactory. If necessary you are authorized to proceed as proposed your para 2.
Cognizant of your difficulties re total to be set aside, so approve $25,000,000. Urge, however, that non-monetary gold be addition to this amount since really restitution item.

Further reference Deptel 84 for Angell Dec 10,See telegram 5760, December 10, 7 p.m., to Paris, p. 1451. revised view here that Brit proposal to have Board of Trustees administering reparation for victims of Nazi persecution placed under UNO is inacceptable.
Subject to above recommendations urtel 147, Dec 12See telegram 7138, December 12, midnight, from Paris, p. 1467. approved.
